summary: Tested Concierge Hours configuration feature. Fixed a ReferenceError bug in DoggyServiceDesk.jsx where 'Check' icon was not imported from lucide-react. Backend APIs (GET/PUT /api/os/concierge/admin/hours) working correctly. Frontend Settings modal with Concierge Hours tab now renders without crashing.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing 'Check' import from lucide-react on line 23 of DoggyServiceDesk.jsx - this was causing ReferenceError when clicking Concierge Hours tab

features_tested.GET /api/os/concierge/admin/hours: PASS - Returns current hours config with status and presets
features_tested.Service Desk Settings modal: PASS - Opens correctly via gear icon
features_tested.Concierge Hours tab in Settings: PASS - Now renders without crashing after fix
features_tested.Timezone selector: PASS - IST, UTC, CET, SGT, EST, PST options available
features_tested.Quick Presets: PASS - Business, Extended, Long hour presets working
features_tested.Save Hours button: PASS - Saves config and shows success

bug_fixed.cause: The 'Check' icon component from lucide-react was used but not imported
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'Check' to the lucide-react imports on line 23

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing admin settings collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Concierge Hours configuration feature is fully working. Backend APIs verified with 7 pytest tests. Frontend Settings modal with Concierge Hours tab renders correctly. The fix was adding the missing 'Check' import from lucide-react.
